Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=46.8523&lon=-121.7603&date=2026-03-11&start=04:30" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('weather',{}\).get\('trend',[]\); print\(f'Total trend points: {len\(t\)}'\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"time\\"]}'\) for p in t]" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=46.8523&lon=-121.7603&date=2026-03-12&start=04:30" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('weather',{}\).get\('trend',[]\); print\(f'Total trend points: {len\(t\)}'\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"time\\"]}'\) for p in t]" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=46.8523&lon=-121.7603&date=2026-03-12&start=04:30" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
w = d.get\('weather', {}\)
print\('Keys in weather:', list\(w.keys\(\)\)\)
t = w.get\('trend', []\)
print\(f'trend count: {len\(t\)}'\)
h = w.get\('hourly', []\)
print\(f'hourly count: {len\(h\)}'\)
hp = w.get\('hourlyPoints', []\)
print\(f'hourlyPoints count: {len\(hp\)}'\)
for k in w:
    v = w[k]
    if isinstance\(v, list\) and len\(v\) > 2:
        print\(f'{k}: {len\(v\)} items, first: {v[0] if v else None}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=46.8523&lon=-121.7603&date=2026-03-12&start=04:30&end=18:00" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
t = d.get\('weather', {}\).get\('trend', []\)
print\(f'trend count: {len\(t\)}'\)
for p in t[:5]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"time\\"]} temp={p[\\"temp\\"]} wind={p[\\"wind\\"]} gust={p[\\"gust\\"]}'\)
if len\(t\) > 5:
    print\(f'  ... and {len\(t\)-5} more'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=40.2549&lon=-105.615&date=2026-03-12&start=06:00&travelWindowHours=12" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
t = d.get\('weather', {}\).get\('trend', []\)
print\(f'trend count: {len\(t\)}'\)
for p in t:

")

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=40.2549&lon=-105.615&date=2026-03-12&start=06:00&travelWindowHours=12" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
s = d.get\('safety', {}\)
print\(f'Score: {s.get\(\\"score\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'Primary hazard: {s.get\(\\"primaryHazard\\"\)}'\)
for f in \(s.get\('factors'\) or []\)[:8]:
    print\(f'  {f.get\(\\"hazard\\"\)}: impact={f.get\(\\"impact\\"\)} message={f.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)[:60]}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=40.2549&lon=-105.615&date=2026-03-12&start=06:00&travelWindowHours=12" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Check avalanche text for HTML
a = d.get\('avalanche', {}\)
bl = a.get\('bottomLine', ''\)
print\('bottomLine:', repr\(bl[:200]\) if bl else 'None'\)
probs = a.get\('problems', []\)
for p in probs[:2]:
    disc = p.get\('discussion', ''\)
    print\(f'problem discussion: {repr\(disc[:200]\) if disc else \\"None\\"}'\)
# Check timestamps
w = d.get\('weather', {}\)
print\(f'weather.generatedTime: {w.get\(\\"generatedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'weather.issuedTime: {w.get\(\\"issuedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'avalanche.generatedTime: {a.get\(\\"generatedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'avalanche.publishedTime: {a.get\(\\"publishedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'alerts.generatedTime: {d.get\(\\"alerts\\", {}\).get\(\\"generatedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'snowpack.generatedTime: {d.get\(\\"snowpack\\", {}\).get\(\\"generatedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'rainfall.generatedTime: {d.get\(\\"rainfall\\", {}\).get\(\\"generatedTime\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'generatedAt: {d.get\(\\"generatedAt\\"\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://apivps.conditions.weiranxiong.com/api/safety?lat=46.8523&lon=-121.7603&date=2026-03-12&start=06:00&travelWindowHours=12" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
a = d.get\('avalanche', {}\)
bl = a.get\('bottomLine', ''\)
print\('bottomLine:', repr\(bl[:400]\) if bl else 'None'\)
probs = a.get\('problems', []\)
for p in probs[:2]:
    disc = p.get\('discussion', ''\)
    print\(f'problem discussion: {repr\(disc[:300]\) if disc else \\"None\\"}'\)
" 2>&1)
